status: R0 official HP Z2 LM Studio smoke prompt
description: Single-prompt visible-output smoke used to establish a fresh HP Z2 + LM Studio/Vulkan model viability baseline. This is not a RAG eval and not a Phase 2 heavy run.
policy: Run only on the HP Z2 official runner.
Use the same prompt, temperature, max_tokens, context length, and load profile for every candidate model.
Do not compare these latency values with earlier 5080, subpc, or Ollama runs.
Completion-token throughput is raw API usage/completion_tokens divided by API wall time; hidden/thinking token overhead must be recorded separately from visible output quality.

tests.title: Short visible output check
tests.intent: Verify that the model loads through LM Studio/Vulkan and returns visible text under a shared low-context smoke profile.
tests.expected: Visible output contains OK or an equivalent one-sentence acknowledgement.
tests.system: You are being tested for backend smoke only. Do not solve a clinical task. Do not reveal reasoning. Return one short visible sentence only.
tests.user: Say OK in one short sentence.
